name: Ada
known_facts: Listed KIA before final blast confirmation.
One of four Cape Wipeout survivors (with Tallai/Talla, Q, and Quartz).
Named in the refined Nago plate's in-world Honor & Origin line as one of those who carried Nago.
Full credited name and role per the Friedmandostorp rescue animatic: Adanna "Ada" Venter, credited Care Shooter.
Carries a necklace, a gift from KC (confirmed by Kemi, 2026-06-23). Who KC is, and whether KC relates to the "Kassey" on Ada's military record, is open — see 01_canon/OPEN_QUESTIONS.md #29.
open_question: The animatic burns the name "Kassey" across a torn military record for an "Adanna K. [Venter]" (stamped CLEARANCE DENIED, KIA, tagged Chimera Survivor / Scientist / Empath) in the same panel as Ada's introduction. Whether Kassey is the same person as Ada under a second name, a relative, or someone else is not stated — see 01_canon/VISUAL_CANON_REGISTRY.md and 01_canon/OPEN_QUESTIONS.md. A separate-but-possibly-related thread: Ada's necklace is a gift from "KC" (Kemi-confirmed); whether KC and Kassey are the same is open (#29).
dossier_status: IN PROGRESS — see 02_characters/ADA_DOSSIER.md (role facts compiled, open fields awaiting Kemi)

name: Tallai / Talla
status: LOCKED (role) / OPEN QUESTION (preferred single spelling) / AWAITING FRAGMENT (full dossier)
known_facts: Known at the bread stop in Friedmandostorp before the blast.
One of four Cape Wipeout survivors.
Named in the refined Nago plate's in-world Honor & Origin line as one of those who carried Nago.
open_question: Both 'Tallai' and 'Talla' are attested across source documents. Whether this is a nickname/full-name pair or a spelling that should converge on one form is open — see 01_canon/OPEN_QUESTIONS.md.

name: Q
known_facts: Detects — scout/sensing role ("Q detects. Quartz carries.").
One of four Cape Wipeout survivors.
Named in the refined Nago plate's in-world Honor & Origin line as one of those who carried Nago.

name: Quartz
known_facts: Carries — load-bearer / rescue anchor ("Q detects. Quartz carries.").
One of four Cape Wipeout survivors.
Not named in the refined Nago plate's in-world Honor & Origin line, which credits Tallai, Ada, Q, and "the people" — see open question in 01_canon/OPEN_QUESTIONS.md.
